metadata.title: Contact Us | FitMetrics
metadata.description: Reach FitMetrics sales or support. Share your requirements and our team will respond within one business day.

hero.title: Contact our team
hero.subtitle: Whether you need product help, partnership details, or enterprise onboarding, we will route your request to the right specialist quickly.

formCard.title: Tell us how we can help
formCard.subtitle: Share a few details and we will reach out with the best next step.
formCard.responseNote: For urgent issues, include your account email and calculator name in the message.

channels.title: Prefer a direct channel?
channels.subtitle: Choose the fastest way to reach the right team.

items.title: General Support
items.description: Questions about calculators, account access, or saved reports.

items.title: Phone Assistance
items.description: Speak with our team during business hours for quick clarification.

items.title: Partnerships
items.description: Discuss integrations, B2B plans, and organization-wide onboarding.

office.title: Location
office.subtitle: We support customers across India and remote teams globally.

items.q: How quickly will I hear back?
items.a: Most enquiries receive a first response within one business day.

items.q: What should I include in my message?
items.a: Mention your goal, timeline, and any relevant screenshots or calculator names for faster resolution.
Yes. We offer onboarding guidance and custom support workflows for organizations.

successMessage: Thanks for reaching out. Our team has received your message and will get back to you soon.
